note: Broad constructed archetypes. Edit freely to reflect the current metagame.

archetypes.name: Mono-Red Aggro
archetypes.strategy: Apply pressure with one-drop creatures and finish with burn.

archetypes.name: Izzet Prowess
archetypes.strategy: Aggro-tempo: cheap spells trigger prowess creatures while interacting.

archetypes.name: Azorius Control
archetypes.strategy: Counter and sweep threats, then win with a planeswalker or a single finisher.

archetypes.name: Golgari Midrange
archetypes.strategy: Grind with efficient removal and resilient, value-laden creatures.

archetypes.name: Mono-Green Devotion
archetypes.strategy: Ramp with mana creatures into powerful midrange and combo payoffs.

archetypes.name: Selesnya Tokens
archetypes.strategy: Flood the board with tokens and pump them with anthems.
